title: Making slip
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"156jv","text":"Rough procedure for making slip including colored slip.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Bone dry clay (small chunks/trimmings are better). Drying clay first allows it to break down and mix better than using wet recycled clay.
Cover with water. Soak overnight at least.
Blend. I used an old blender. Adding water as needed to keep it moving.
If using as slip, keep it in a sealed container.
If using as moist clay, pour onto plaster to dehydrate.
To keep track of the percent colorant you first have to get the amount of clay in your slip (vs water content).
creator: Amber York
